subject: Get the F1000 advantage and stay on top of what's important!
body:
Faculty of 1000 Biology <http://www.f1000biology.com/>   

"My only regret is that I didn't discover this website sooner!"
Claire Tseng, Harvard University, USA	

--------------------------------------------------------------------

Recommend to your librarian

Dear Colleague, 

As a registrant of Faculty of 1000 Biology <http://www.f1000biology.com/>, you
may already be aware that this unique, award-winning service alerts you to the
best and most interesting papers in your field. But did you know that it also
highlights key papers that you may have missed from adjacent fields and gives
you access to the opinions of the world's leading researchers? 

Below is a sample evaluation from our Top 10 Hidden Jewels list
<http://www.f1000biology.com/top10/jewels/>, one of our most popular features,
usually only available to trialists or subscribers. 

Exceptional 	
F1000 Factor 9.0	
Discovery, characterization, and optimization of an unnatural base pair for
expansion of the genetic alphabet
<http://www.f1000biology.com/article/id/1100355/evaluation> 
Leconte AM, Hwang GT, Matsuda S, Capek P, Hari Y, Romesberg FE 
J Am Chem Soc 2008 Feb 20 130 (7):2336-43 	
 	
"The authors report the discovery of two artificial DNA "letters" that are
accurately and efficiently replicated by a natural polymerase..." 
[More] <http://www.f1000biology.com/article/id/1100355/evaluation> 
Anthony Czarnik <http://www.f1000biology.com/about/biography/1324912705295623>
(University of Nevada, USA), Chemical Biology F1000 Biology Faculty Member	

Faculty of 1000 Biology 

* saves you time searching for key papers by systematically highlighting and
evaluating the literature in your field
* provides expert opinions from over 2300 of the world's leading scientists
across all areas of Biology <http://www.f1000biology.com/about/members> 
* features site customization and email alerts tailored to your interests. 

90% of the world's top institutions currently subscribe to Faculty of 1000
Biology. If you and your colleagues don't yet have the F1000 advantage, simply
click here to complete our quick online form to recommend this service to your
librarian. <http://www.f1000biology.com/about/institution/academic/recommend> 

If you already have institutional access, please continue to recommend F1000
Biology to your librarian to ensure that your subscription continues
uninterrupted. 


Best wishes,

Dave Weedon, PhD 
Managing Director
Faculty of 1000 Biology <http://www.f1000biology.com/> 
info@f1000biology.com

Recommend to your librarian


Dear Colleague,

As a registrant of Faculty of 1000 Biology, you may already be aware that this unique, award-winning service alerts you to the best and most interesting papers in your field. But did you know that it also highlights key papers that you may have missed from adjacent fields and gives you access to the opinions of the world's leading researchers?

Faculty of 1000 Biology

  • saves you time searching for key papers by systematically highlighting and evaluating the literature in your field
  • provides expert opinions from over 2300 of the world's leading scientists across all areas of Biology
  • features site customization and email alerts tailored to your interests.

90% of the world's top institutions currently subscribe to Faculty of 1000 Biology. If you and your colleagues don't yet have the F1000 advantage, simply click here to complete our quick online form to recommend this service to your librarian.

If you already have institutional access, please continue to recommend F1000 Biology to your librarian to ensure that your subscription continues uninterrupted.
